nasb.text: for this reason, brethren, in all our distress and affliction we were comforted about you through your faith;

esv.text: for this reason, brothers, in all our distress and affliction we have been comforted about you through your faith.

cnv.text: 所以弟兄們，我們在這一切困苦患難中，因著你們的信心就得了安慰。

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，你们的信心使我们在万般困苦和患难中得到了激励。

csbs.text: 所以弟兄们，在我们的一切困苦和患难中，由于你们的缘故，藉着你们的信心，我们就受到安慰，
